findings.issue: /numbers route returns 404 but was referenced 7 times on the page including the §07 Sources card.
findings.fix: All /numbers references replaced. Hero now points at docs/home-restructure-spec.md. Stats tile 1 (Channels Live) now points at /jcp. §07 card 2 rewrote as 'Spec & audit trail' pointing at the spec + this audit JSON.

findings.issue: Sell + Move subtitles read 'live' but contain Pilot platforms (Kio, AutRi).
findings.fix: Both retitled 'live + pilot' to match Buy/Make precedent.

findings.issue: JCP card '100+ brands' framing not reconciled with mega-menu's '79 channels' framing.
findings.fix: Added '— 79 channels live, building, or in pilot' to the brands line so both framings reconcile in one sentence.

findings.issue: Side-guard cards (Retail Jarvis, ALP, RetailVista) had no visible status pill — readers scanning §02 had no signal of Build/Live status.
findings.fix: Added .stack-side-head row with status pill. Retail Jarvis · Build, ALP · Live, RetailVista · Live.

strengths: Spec mode discipline: §9 decisions block locked all 5 open questions with explicit user sign-off before any HTML was written. Restructure reads like the spec, line-for-line.
§03 filter chip counts compute from PLATFORMS data — drift-proof (initial v0.10 build had 3 wrong counts; fix made the bug structurally impossible).
All 25 §03 platform card links return 200 (verified via curl sweep).
§02 stack-layer click → §03 filter scroll-and-apply interaction implemented and verified end-to-end via Chrome DevTools MCP.
Mobile (375px) order correctly puts the main 5-layer tower BEFORE side guards via CSS order, so the load-bearing visual lands first on small screens.
All 5 audit findings resolved in same session — no carry-over to future iteration.
checks_passed: All 12 dates use canonical 'DD - MMM - YYYY' format
No banned vocabulary (transformative · world-class · cutting-edge · leverages · seamless · etc.)
No banned constructions ('strong interest in', 'In summary', 'This is not X. It is Y.')
No emojis or exclamation marks in copy
Indian number format (L Cr) preserved in Reliance scale numbers
Reliance entity names cased correctly (RIL · RRVL · RBL · RCPL · JPL · JioMart · AJIO · Tira · Reliance Trends · Reliance Jewels · Smart Bazaar · FreshPik)
Fynd platform names cased correctly (JCP · UCP · Impetus · Granary · PixelBin · Boltic · Ratl · Kaily · Fynd Horizon · AutRi · PulsePoint · Cortex)
Topnav verbatim with sibling pages (mega-menu suffixes match)
Stack-layer subtitles honest about mixed Live + Pilot status
Side-guard cards now expose status pill (Build / Live)
Console clean (only standard Tailwind CDN dev warning)
